function.name: sum_of_digits
function.description: Calculate the sum of digits in a number.
function.long_description: Computes the sum of all individual digits in a number, treating negative numbers as their absolute value.
example_user_queries: Find the sum of digits in 12345.
What is the digit sum of 908172?
Give me the sum of all digits in 40060.
Find the total of the digits in 24680.
What do the digits of 777 add up to?
Tell me the digit sum for the number 1000001.
